caveat: Control is provisional and not as close an industry match as originally hoped.
robustness_note: Replace the provisional control if a better major-appliance subcategory series can be recovered later.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 at the base month. Relative effect equals treatment minus control.
rationale_short: Add an upstream producer follow-on case for the 2018 washer safeguard using appliance manufacturing treatment and a provisional nearby appliance control.
stage_notes: Provisional upstream producer follow-on case for the 2018 washer safeguard using appliance manufacturing treatment and a lower-confidence nearby appliance control.

robustness_note: Robustness grid stays positive across the washer specifications.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 before the event window. Relative effect equals treatment minus control. The 3m, 6m, and 12m values are post-tariff relative effects. Placebo tests are suggestive but underpowered.
rationale_short: Direct consumer-price category match with a nearby household-goods control
stage_notes: Direct consumer-price incidence case for laundry equipment.

caveat: Control is imperfect because copper and brass followed their own commodity cycle
robustness_note: Relative effect is positive at 3m 6m and 12m.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 before the event window. Relative effect equals treatment minus control. The 3m, 6m, and 12m values are post-tariff relative effects.
rationale_short: Clear aluminum PPI treatment series with a nearby non-ferrous mill-shapes control
stage_notes: Upstream producer-price case for aluminum mill shapes.

caveat: The legal action also covers derivative copper products so this is an upstream case rather than a full-scope copper estimate.
robustness_note: Test aluminum mill shapes against one alternate nonferrous control and consider a downstream follow-on design later.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 at the base month. Relative effect equals treatment minus control.
rationale_short: Use an upstream nonferrous mill-shapes design for the August 2025 copper Section 232 action.
stage_notes: Upstream producer-price case for the August 2025 copper Section 232 action using copper and brass mill shapes versus aluminum mill shapes.

caveat: Control is imperfect because copper and brass followed their own commodity cycle
robustness_note: Relative effect is strongly positive at 3m 6m and 12m.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 before the event window. Relative effect equals treatment minus control. The 3m, 6m, and 12m values are post-tariff relative effects.
rationale_short: Clear steel PPI treatment series with a nearby non-ferrous mill-shapes control
stage_notes: Upstream producer-price case for steel mill products.

caveat: Rate increase sits on top of the existing Section 232 steel regime and the UK temporarily remained at 25 percent.

method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 at the base month. Relative effect equals treatment minus control.
rationale_short: Reuse the historical steel upstream design for the June 2025 rate increase from 25 to 50 percent.
stage_notes: Upstream producer-price case for the June 2025 increase from 25 percent to 50 percent on steel imports.

caveat: Producer-price case; not a direct retail pass-through estimate
robustness_note: Relative effect is positive at 3m 6m and 12m with a modest 6m reading relative to 3m and 12m.
method_note: Treatment and control are rebased to 100 before the event window. Relative effect equals treatment minus control. The 3m, 6m, and 12m values are post-tariff relative effects.
